title: Untargeted Metabolomics: Extraction of Plasma Metabolites
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"1cs33","text":"The extraction of plasma metabolites for untargeted metabolomics involves methanolic protein precipitation from a fixed volume of fasting plasma, aiming to maximize coverage of the plasma metabolome. The proposed protocol includes both external and internal metabolite standards in the extraction process to answert to our quality control (QC) procedures. The expected outcome is a normalized and controlled extraction process, allowing for the accurate comparison of relative metabolite abundances across all samples within the large cohorts.","type":"align-justify","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
before_start: {"blocks":[{"key":"1poqs","text":"To analyze plasma samples, it is essential to collect all samples using the same anticoagulant (preferably EDTA for LC-HRMS analyses)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"7k8kt","text":"For human samples analyses in France, a CODECOH (\"Déclaration ou autorisation des activités de conservation et de préparation à des fins scientifiques d'éléments issus du corps humain\") must be submitted at least 2-3 months in advance to ensure approval before sample reception.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":50,"length":134}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Incubate on ice 01:30:00 until complete protein precipitation
Thaw plasma samples (keep them fresh on ice)

Resuspend dried extracts in 3 volumes of Ammonium carbonate 10mM pH10.5 (with Ammonia solution 25%)+ ES* / Acetonitrile (40:60, v/v) for ZIC-pHILIC analysis or ultrapure water / acetonitrile (95:5, v/v), containing 0.1% formic acid and ES* for C18 analysis. reagents for mobile phases: water LC-MS Chromasolv Fisher Scientific Catalog #15665350 (CAS: 7732-18-5) AMMONIUM CARBONATE, 99.999% Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #379999 (CAS: 506-87-6) Ammonia solution 25% for HPL Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #5438300100 Acetonitrile ULC-MS Biosolve Catalog #0001204101BS Formic acid 99.0+% qualite LC/MS optima Fisher Scientific Catalog #10780320 (CAS: 64-18-6) *ES (external standards : mixture of 14 authentic chemical standards covering the mass range of interest : D-Glucose-1-*13*C Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #297046 (CAS: 40762-22-9) , L-Aspartic acid-*15*N Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #332135 (CAS: 3715-16-0) , Ethylmalonic acid Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #102687 (CAS: 601-75-2) , Amiloride hydrochloride hydrate Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #A7410 (CAS: 2016-88-8) , prednisone Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #P6254 (CAS: 53-03-2) , Metformine (1,1-Dimethylbiguanide hydrochloride) Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #D150959 (CAS: 1115-70-4) , Atropine Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #A0132 (CAS: 51-55-8) , Colchicine Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #C9754 (CAS: 64-86-8) , Imipramine hydrochloride Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #I7379 (CAS: 113-52-0) , Alanine-C13 Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #489867 2-aminoanthracene Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #A38800 ampicillin Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #59349 Dihydrostreptomycin Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #D7253 Roxithromycin Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #R4393
Performe metabolite extraction twice (HILIC and C18) from 25µL or 50µL of plasma

Add 4 volumes (100µL or 200 µL) of cold MeOH containing internal standards (IS) at 37.5 ng/mL extraction solvent : Methanol LC-MS CHROMASOLV Fisher Scientific Catalog #15614740 (CAS: 67-56-1) Internal standards : Dimetridazole Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #31707 (CAS: 551-92-8) , 2-amino-3-(3-hydroxy-5-methyl-isoxazol-4-yl)propanoic acid (AMPA) Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #A0326 (CAS: 83643-88-3) , 2-methyl-4-chlorophenoxyacetic acid (MCPA) Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #45555 (CAS: 94-74-6) , Dinoseb Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #45453 (CAS: 88-85-7)
Dry supernatants under a nitrogen stream using a TurboVap LV (Evaporator, BIOTAGE, TurboVap® LV) 30 °C
Reorganize plasma samples in random order on dry ice
Thaw plasma samples (keep them fresh on ice)
Create a quality control (QC) : pool of a same volume (~20µL) of all samples
Aliquoting QC : 50µL (or more) depending on available volume

Resuspend dried extracts in 3 volumes of Ammonium carbonate 10mM pH10.5 (with Ammonia solution 25%)+ ES* / Acetonitrile (40:60, v/v) for ZIC-pHILIC analysis or ultrapure water / acetonitrile (95:5, v/v), containing 0.1% formic acid and ES* for C18 analysis. reagents for mobile phases: water LC-MS Chromasolv Fisher Scientific Catalog #15665350 (CAS: 7732-18-5) AMMONIUM CARBONATE, 99.999% Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #379999 (CAS: 506-87-6) Ammonia solution 25% for HPL Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #5438300100 Acetonitrile ULC-MS Biosolve Catalog #0001204101BS Formic acid 99.0+% qualite LC/MS optima Fisher Scientific Catalog #10780320 (CAS: 64-18-6) *ES (external standards : mixture of 14 authentic chemical standards covering the mass range of interest : D-Glucose-1-*13*C Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #297046 (CAS: 40762-22-9) , L-Aspartic acid-*15*N Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #332135 (CAS: 3715-16-0) , Ethylmalonic acid Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #102687 (CAS: 601-75-2) , Amiloride hydrochloride hydrate Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #A7410 (CAS: 2016-88-8) , prednisone Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #P6254 (CAS: 53-03-2) , Metformine (1,1-Dimethylbiguanide hydrochloride) Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #D150959 (CAS: 1115-70-4) , Atropine Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #A0132 (CAS: 51-55-8) , Colchicine Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #C9754 (CAS: 64-86-8) , Imipramine hydrochloride Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #I7379 (CAS: 113-52-0) , Alanine-C13 Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #489867 2-aminoanthracene Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #A38800 ampicillin Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #59349 Dihydrostreptomycin Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #D7253 Roxithromycin Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #R4393
